name: Double Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400°F. Coat a 9- or 10-inch cast iron skillet or heavy 9-inch square baking pan with nonstick vegetable spray. Place in the oven for 5 minutes to preheat.
In a mixing bowl, whisk together flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, salt (1/2 tsp), and ground pepper (1/2 tsp).
In another bowl, whisk milk, oil, and egg until well combined.
Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients with corn. Stir until all ingredients are moistened and combined.
Spoon the batter into the prepared skillet or pan.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cornbread is firm, golden, and pulls away from the sides.
Let cool slightly, then cut into wedges or squares to serve warm or at room temperature. (Alternatively, you can make 12 muffins by baking for 15-18 minutes, or 18 corn sticks by baking for about 10 minutes.)
